treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was comfortable and asymptomatic upon arrival; blood pressure stabilized after transfer to CCU.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented for generator replacement due to ERI.
Lead was cut during the procedure.
Surgery performed for pacemaker lead/device extraction and replacement.
Patient transferred to CCU for closer monitoring due to low blood pressure.
Patient's blood pressure stabilized in CCU and was transferred to the floor.

patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient was ambulatory and independent at discharge.
